category_sources: source_facts.description: GUI for rsync; official SourceForge summary says Grsync synchronizes folders and files and makes backups.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project name is Grsync; source_facts.name is grsync.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official Grsync website; SourceForge project page links to Grsync Web Site and summarizes project usage.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page includes a Code tab for Grsync; SourceForge search result identifies the repository path as sourceforge.net/p/grsync/code/HEAD/tree/.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says GUI for rsync; official SourceForge page lists File Sync, Backup, GTK+, and describes folder/file synchronization.
